programme.title: E16 - The Unpredictable
programme.desc: Frederic Barbary, a former shopkeeper, retrains as a sailor. For this demanding profession, he goes back to school at over 50 years old. While waiting to obtain his navigation ranks, he learns from other sailors and shares his passion when he is not out fishing on his traditional sailing boat.

programme.title: E114
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E6 - Blooming Among The Stars
programme.desc: Swiss artists Nicolas and Julie, masters of bright, shimmering colors, aim to brighten up cities, squares, and the world through joyful installations, paintings, murals, and sculptures. Their vibrant world brings to life the dream of a kinder, more colorful future.

programme.title: E23 - Nona Source/Bateaux-Mouches/T3 Architecture/Fifties Fashion
programme.desc: An ethical alternative project by LVMH, Nona Source is a resale platform for exceptional fabric. All about the origins of the Bateaux-Mouches. The T3 Architecture practice in Marseilles presents architectural design with an artisanal touch. The very feminine fashion style of the 1950s continues to inspire major designers.

programme.title: E24 - Cactus, Song And Charity: The Rule Of The Three Cs!
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of ''Le Grand Cactus'', the show where the best Belgian comedians meet; the Belgian brand C and its boost to the best confectioners in Belgium; the Noirauds fundraiser, a Brussels philanthropic society; meeting with Nicolas Van Overstraeten, a singer for children.

programme.desc: These are the stories of women giving birth at the hospital in Bethlehem. The Holy Family Hospital is a place of hope, in a region marked by conflict, violence and insecurity.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: This pure wildlife docuseries travels from Hokkaido's vast forests to the lush coastlines of Okinawa.

programme.title: E3 - Fists Full Of Snakes
programme.desc: Snake hunter Dusty and his team mount a critical hunt from a swamp buggy before racing south to the python-infested Ten Thousand Islands.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: This pure wildlife docuseries travels from Hokkaido's vast forests to the lush coastlines of Okinawa.

programme.title: E2 - 孤注一擲
programme.desc: This visually stunning four-part series reveals how Earth's epic forces have sculpted some of the planet's most astonishing animals.

programme.title: Amba The Russian Tiger
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan searches majestic Vladivostok for the Russian Tiger and meets the people who live with these elusive beasts.

programme.desc: The worlds fastest animal a peregrine falcon is grounded after being covered in cooking oil.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: This time, Jamie's dressing a salad in a way you've never seen before... with a crown of cheese! He's got a speedy, tasty twist on your Sunday roast that keeps it all in one pan; and puts store-cupboard essentials centre stage in two fabulous family meals that are made in minutes. Finally, YouTube sensation Alex Ainouz shares his fabulous 5-ingredient take on a French classic.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

The United Archives E2114 -PL: Blackburn v United 10/11
The United Archives E2114 -PL: Blackburn v United 10/11
E35 - 'x' Marks The Swop
programme.desc: An old map, mysterious clues and ancient secrets... Mojo and Bo are after the treasure of the Knights of Swoppiton! But Preston's after it too, so they need to get there first.

programme.title: E35 - Smoochy Kiss
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: E8 - The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: E17 - Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: E4 - The Camouflage Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a chameleon called Cosey and learn about blending into surroundings.

programme.title: E15 - Go Jetter Or No Jetter?
programme.desc: Foz starts to think his team doesn't need him anymore. Can Tala convince him he still has what it takes to be a Go Jetter, or will he follow Glitch down a different path?

programme.title: E14 - Bench Blocked
programme.desc: When Sarah and Duck's favourite bench is in use, the pair find other things to do.

programme.title: E15 - Planetarium Aquarium
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck go to the aquarium to track down a waving fish.

programme.title: E16 - Sofa
programme.desc: Stanley has to fix Myrtles wobbly sofa so her and her friends can watch Fred and Fifi on the Boogie Woogie Dance Show together. He ends up creating a super-duper special sofa.

programme.title: E36 - It's Time To Build A Snowman!
programme.desc: It's a snowy day and JoJo and Gran Gran go to the park to build a snow panda!

programme.title: E31 - Onesies
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: E31 - The A Cappella Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are inspired to learn how to sing a cappella style.

programme.title: E22 - Ping Pong Penguins
programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits Theatre, it's the spectacular acrobatic grapes working together to perform the most difficult structures to perfection.

programme.title: United We Stand
programme.desc: Alias “Springing Gazelle”, the renowned athlete Miss Chi Cheng is in Hong Kong helping to organize a training programme and hunt for a coach. Olivia was a former brilliant sprinter who has to give up running after her injury in a competition. At the beginning of the training, the girls are too pompous that they despise Olivia, until they find that Olivia is beyond their challenge, they adore her and are willing to go through the hardship but after a winning contest, they feel hostility towards each other and behave proudly. As a result, they lost in the competition with Singapore team. Olivia is so furious...

programme.title: Hero Beyond The Boundary Of Time
programme.desc: Imperial Court member Wai Siu-Bo is sent forward in time to present-day Hong Kong, to find a woman who can cure the Emperor of his illness. Can Siu-Bo accomplish his mission?

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: The contract is a piece of almost blank paper by which MTV binds all its employees to eight years of impecunious service. Chi-Man, an aspiring but frustrated artist, hates the contract since he is given no chance of getting ahead. He constantly thinks of moving to greener pastures. His brother Chi-Ying is a self-made investor who has just come up with a laugh bomb. By chance, Chi-Man becomes the host of a Cat TV program. With the aid of the laugh bomb, he becomes an instant success, yet...

programme.title: United We Stand
programme.desc: Alias “Springing Gazelle”, the renowned athlete Miss Chi Cheng is in Hong Kong helping to organize a training programme and hunt for a coach. Olivia was a former brilliant sprinter who has to give up running after her injury in a competition. At the beginning of the training, the girls are too pompous that they despise Olivia, until they find that Olivia is beyond their challenge, they adore her and are willing to go through the hardship but after a winning contest, they feel hostility towards each other and behave proudly. As a result, they lost in the competition with Singapore team. Olivia is so furious...

programme.title: Fruit Punch
programme.desc: Five young men threw themselves with heart and soul into the work force. They have different approaches and different life styles. Ah Kit is the hardworking investment broker. He is so busy making money. Ah Chi is a postman believing in fung shui. Ah Hark is an apprentice in his family jewelry shop and Ah Wai failed in public exam. Ah Ming is the most unconventional of the five. Working in a Japanese restaurant. The five start a laundry shop which soon folds. Next, they try something new to save their business. Ah Ming leads a carefree life which dismays his girl, Yoko. Ah Hark's girlfriend Cat will move to Australia and leave him soon. Ah Ming and Ah Hark are going to lose their girlfriends. The five new generation are going their own ways...

programme.title: E5 - Green Bean/Cash Machine
programme.desc: Mr Bean’s electricity is cut off so he builds a wind turbine – all fine until there’s too much wind!

programme.title: E1405 - Four Hundred/Teen Titans Action Part 1/Teen Titans Action Part 2/Tv Knight 8
programme.desc: After Teen Titans Go! wins the award for being DC’s longest running animated series, a jealous Superman banishes the Titans to world of stop-motion in order to get their show cancelled.

programme.title: E15 - Good Mitch Spiking/Stilt Walkers
programme.desc: Muscle Man reveals his secret past.

programme.title: E426 - Boss' Birthday/Boss' Mom Ii/Tall Tales
programme.desc: In order to win his approval, the two Docs plan to catch Lamput to surprise Boss’ on his birthday, but things get complicated with the other docs in the lab plan to do the same thing. A fierce race starts between the two teams!

programme.title: E15 - Good Mitch Spiking/Stilt Walkers
programme.desc: Muscle Man reveals his secret past.

programme.title: E7 - Litterbug/Rat Trap
programme.desc: Mr Bean is tired of litterbugs and attempts to clean up the whole town himself…with disastrous results.

programme.title: E15 - Good Mitch Spiking/Stilt Walkers
programme.desc: Muscle Man reveals his secret past.

programme.title: E6 - Burrito/Charlie/Jean Jacket/Food Truck/Primal
programme.desc: Grizz likes burritos. A lot. So much so that after a restaurant makes a bear-sized burrito, Grizz can't bring himself to eat such a majestic work of art. He carries the burrito everywhere, making it a new and increasingly smelly part of his life.

programme.title: E62 - We Need To Talk/Chille Tid/Cry For Help
programme.desc: Greg tells Steven and Connie the story of how he learned about Gem fusion.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E3 - Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Join Kii & Yii for songs about feeling good & staying safe! First, learn the best way to get a healthy smile in a fun & educational song about how to brush your teeth properly. Then, learn how to be safe when you're riding a bike at the playground. The lessons continue as Kii & Yii sing about being kind to each other, especially when a friend is sick. From learning colors to singing a soothing lullaby, these songs will make you feel good!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!

programme.title: E3 - Sleep Music With Twinkle
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.
SUMMARY OF PRESS: Providing a concise review of what's in the press, the show highlights the important news by presenting newspaper headlines and editorial from respected.

programme.title: Soul Mate
programme.desc: Qiyue and Ansheng are two high school best friends. Qiyue is calm like water while Ansheng is a fiery ball of passion. As fate would have it, they fall in love with the same man, Jia-ming. Because of their different values and lifestyles, they are destined to arrive at two completely different endings...

programme.title: 2gether: The Movie
programme.desc: Tine Mr. Chic, a cheeky good-looking university student, finds himself in big trouble after being romantically and aggressively chased by Green, a handsome guy. To push Green away, Tine asks Sarawat, the hottest guy on campus, to pretend to flirt with him. Little does he know that there is not even a shred of pretense in Sarawat's flirt. Not to Tine's knowledge, a few years ago, Sarawat met Tine at a Scrubb concert and fell for Tine ever since. That is how a fake flirt operation becomes true love for Sarawat and Tine whose story is told through hit songs by Scrubb.

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.title: Haw
programme.desc: Tamio Akanishi is a hapless public servant who has just hit the low point of his life having been dumped by his fiancee. He spends his days living alone in a big house he had bought for a married life that never materialized. At the recommendation of his concerned boss, he adopts a large white dog that had been abandoned by a previous owner who had mistreated him. The dog can only eke out a raspy whisper due to having had his vocal cords removed. Tamio names the extremely loving and trusting dog 'Haw' for the sound he makes, and thus begins the rapturously joyful life of a man and his dog.

programme.title: She Remembers, He Forgets
programme.desc: Unfulfilled at work and dissatisfied with her marital life, a middle-aged woman attends a high school reunion and finds a floodgate of flashbacks of her salad days open before her mind's eyes. She was inseparable with two boys 20 years ago but married one of them eventually. All the memories eventually zero in on one critical incident that changed her life and those of the boys forever...

programme.title: L'édition nuit : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: L'actualité ne s'arrête jamais. Un journal complet consacré à l'information française et internationale, pour rester informé à tout moment, où que l'on soit dans le monde.

programme.title: L'instant mobile
programme.desc: Une émission d'information au format court qui traite des sujets les plus captivants venus du monde entier. À travers des reportages dynamiques et un regard incisif, elle propose un condensé de l'actualité internationale pour rester informé rapidement et efficacement.

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.desc: Luc lives in an underground house, almost entirely self-sufficient, which he built himself. Show Bis, the association that recovers old theatre sets and costumes to give them a second life. In Montville, school canteens cook with local products, in short supply chains.

programme.title: Awaargi
programme.desc: Azad rescues a girl from a brothel, attracting the ire of the mob, and helps her achieve her dream with Dhiren's aid. However, both the men fall in love with her while the mobs seek revenge on Azad.

programme.title: Metro In Dino
programme.desc: The bittersweet stories of four urban-dwelling couples intertwine as they navigate the complexities and joys of relationships in modern-day India.

programme.title: A.aa 2
programme.desc: Mohan falls in love with Megha, who lives in the United States. Later, they get separated because of some circumstances, but it turns out that destiny has other plans for them.

programme.title: Sardar Ka Grandson
programme.desc: A devoted grandson embarks on a complicated and comic journey to fulfill his ailing grandmother's last wish.

programme.title: The Diplomat
programme.desc: Follows an Indian diplomat who tries to repatriate an Indian girl from foreign land, where she was presumably forced and deceived into marrying against her will.

programme.title: E2 - Aileen Wuornos: The Damsel Of Death
programme.desc: Aileen Wuornos is a woman fleeing a troubled past and yearning for a connection. Instead of finding love, she develops a simmering rage in her heart that finally explodes.

programme.title: E6 - Lovers, Lies And Canyon Murder
programme.desc: In 1987 Carol Murphy, 28, is found by hikers slain in a wooded area of Lefthand Canyon, CO. Police uncover a turbulent love life and plenty of suspects in this Western enclave.

programme.title: E3 - Women Who Kill - Lakhvir Singh
programme.desc: Lakhvir Singh enjoyed cooking for Lucky Cheema, the man she loved. But when he left her to marry a much younger woman, Singh made the couple a meal that would turn out to be the last Lucky ever tasted.

programme.title: E1 - Assassins
programme.desc: Meet real life hired killers operating in organised networks in the Philippines, where even cops and politicians are known to have been targeted.

programme.title: E2 - Paedophiles
programme.desc: Cambodia's under-developed social infrastructure has created an infamous breeding ground for child prostitution and sex tourism.

programme.title: E6 - Killer Knifeman Or Innocent Defender?
programme.desc: A 52-year-old VP of a medical center faces 95 years in prison for fatally stabbing a doctor's husband. He insists he was trapped by a man intent on harming him and forced to defend himself.

programme.desc: Meet real life hired killers operating in organised networks in the Philippines, where even cops and politicians are known to have been targeted.

programme.title: E6 - Lovers, Lies And Canyon Murder
programme.desc: In 1987 Carol Murphy, 28, is found by hikers slain in a wooded area of Lefthand Canyon, CO. Police uncover a turbulent love life and plenty of suspects in this Western enclave.

programme.title: E3 - Women Who Kill - Lakhvir Singh
programme.desc: Lakhvir Singh enjoyed cooking for Lucky Cheema, the man she loved. But when he left her to marry a much younger woman, Singh made the couple a meal that would turn out to be the last Lucky ever tasted.

programme.title: E6 - Killer Knifeman Or Innocent Defender?
programme.desc: A 52-year-old VP of a medical center faces 95 years in prison for fatally stabbing a doctor's husband. He insists he was trapped by a man intent on harming him and forced to defend himself.

programme.desc: In an unruly world our ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. Who will find the right way to rule?

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Michael continues his journey into the heart of Iraq on his way to Baghdad, and arrives in Kirkuk and the exact spot where the British discovered oil in 1927, when they also ruled the country. The next day, Michael heads towards Tikrit, Saddam Hussein's hometown. Having been stopped at several military checkpoints along the way, but is surprised when he receives a warm welcome from the local commander and coins it 'Checkpoint Cheerful'.

programme.title: E59
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E10 - 邦邦深情獻歌表白
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

programme.title: E10 - 邦邦深情獻歌表白
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

programme.title: E9 - 解鎖你的人生坐標
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: E9 - 解鎖你的人生坐標
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: E59
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E7 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E4 - Sturts Steps
programme.desc: Flanked by three Australian States this journey re-traces part of the expedition undertaken by European Explorer Charles Sturt in the 1840’s, when he was looking to discover an inland sea, in the very interior of the country.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. E4 - Hawaii
programme.desc: Get ready to understand the science behind Hawaii's stunning beaches. Why does sand appear white, yellow, black, green and red? How do active volcanoes change the coastline? Are other forces at play in shaping these incredible beaches?

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility
programme.desc: Watch summer unfold in the Northern Hemisphere, while regions close to the equator enter the wet season and Southern Africa goes dry, creating scarcity for some creatures and bounty for others.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E4 - Hawaii
programme.desc: Get ready to understand the science behind Hawaii's stunning beaches. Why does sand appear white, yellow, black, green and red? How do active volcanoes change the coastline? Are other forces at play in shaping these incredible beaches?

programme.title: The Ocean's Greatest Feast
programme.desc: Get a front-row seat to the planet’s biggest biomass migration, the annual 1,000-mile sardine run along South Africa’s east coast. See billions of these tiny fish run a gauntlet of hungry predators, including stealthy seals and dive-bombing gannets.

programme.title: E1 - Bound By Blood
programme.desc: Experience unbelievable acts of courage and loyalty by creatures trying to survive in the remote wilderness of New Zealand’s South Island. Face forest penguins’ feast and famine cycles, and explore the tumultuous world of newborn sea lions.

programme.title: E4 - Hawaii
programme.desc: Get ready to understand the science behind Hawaii's stunning beaches. Why does sand appear white, yellow, black, green and red? How do active volcanoes change the coastline? Are other forces at play in shaping these incredible beaches?

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility
programme.desc: Watch summer unfold in the Northern Hemisphere, while regions close to the equator enter the wet season and Southern Africa goes dry, creating scarcity for some creatures and bounty for others.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E2 - To Catch a Legend
programme.desc: Sniff around The Dude’s territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought. Challenge previous research about snow leopard behaviour when Dan stumbles upon an unusual cluster of big cats.

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.desc: Sniff around The Dude’s territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought. Challenge previous research about snow leopard behaviour when Dan stumbles upon an unusual cluster of big cats.

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: Discover the most fantastic city of them all lying beneath the waves, where romance and migratory commuters flood the coral reef’s main highways. Follow a green sea turtle looking for love and sit in with a cassowary dad tending his newborn chicks.

programme.title: E4 - Winter
programme.desc: Get chills as winter descends, slowing down life on the bustling reef. Meander with reef sharks and octopuses, visit a coral oasis atop an old shipwreck, and spot a banded snake eel’s talent for identity theft when it disguises itself as a predator.

programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E2 - To Catch a Legend
programme.desc: Sniff around The Dude’s territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought. Challenge previous research about snow leopard behaviour when Dan stumbles upon an unusual cluster of big cats.

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E2 - To Catch a Legend

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: Discover the most fantastic city of them all lying beneath the waves, where romance and migratory commuters flood the coral reef’s main highways. Follow a green sea turtle looking for love and sit in with a cassowary dad tending his newborn chicks.

programme.title: E4 - Winter
programme.desc: Get chills as winter descends, slowing down life on the bustling reef. Meander with reef sharks and octopuses, visit a coral oasis atop an old shipwreck, and spot a banded snake eel’s talent for identity theft when it disguises itself as a predator.

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E2 - To Catch a Legend
programme.desc: Sniff around The Dude’s territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought. Challenge previous research about snow leopard behaviour when Dan stumbles upon an unusual cluster of big cats.

programme.title: The Ocean's Greatest Feast
programme.desc: Get a front-row seat to the planet’s biggest biomass migration, the annual 1,000-mile sardine run along South Africa’s east coast. See billions of these tiny fish run a gauntlet of hungry predators, including stealthy seals and dive-bombing gannets.

programme.title: E4 - Hawaii
programme.desc: Get ready to understand the science behind Hawaii's stunning beaches. Why does sand appear white, yellow, black, green and red? How do active volcanoes change the coastline? Are other forces at play in shaping these incredible beaches?

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E47
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E50
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E50
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。
